zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adomar Strathbogie於1311年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，他的父親David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl26歲，母親Jeanne Comyn19歲。他於1332年之前與Eleanor Felton在英國諾圖波藍德費爾頓結婚。他去世於1402年4月14日享年91歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾霍利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adomar Strathbogie于1311年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，他的父亲David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl26岁，母亲Jeanne Comyn19岁。他于1332年之前与Eleanor Felton在英国諾圖波藍德費爾頓结婚。他去世于1402年4月14日享年91岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰諾斯 艾斯爾霍利。

nameMeanings.name: Adomar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: from the personal name Alomar, especially frequent in the Balearic Islands, from the medieval name Eldemarus or Aldemarus, of ancient Germanic origin.
Muslim: variant of Omar , with the addition of al ‘the’.

variants.name: Omar
meanings: Biblical name (apparently meaning ‘talkative’ in Hebrew) borne by a character mentioned in a genealogy (Genesis 36:11). It has been occasionally used from Puritan times down to the present day, especially in America. More often, however, it is of Arabic origin, as in the case of the film actor and international bridge player  Omar Sharif  (  b. 1932  in Egypt).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adomar Strathbogie was born in 1311, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl, was 26 and his mother, Jeanne Comyn, was 19. He married Eleanor Felton before 1332, in Felton, Northumberland, England. He died on 14 April 1402, at the age of 91, and was buried in Holy, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adomar Strathbogie est né en 1311, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Comyn, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Felton avant 1332, à Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1402, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Holy, North Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adomar Strathbogie 1311 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl 26 und seine Mutter Jeanne Comyn 19. Er hat vor 1332 in Felton, Northumberland, England Eleanor Felton geheiratet. Er starb am 14. April 1402 im Alter von 91 Jahren und wurde in Holy, North Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adomar Strathbogie è nato il nel 1311 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne Comyn, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Felton prima del 1332, nel Felton, Northumberland, England. Morì il 14 aprile 1402, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Holy, North Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adomar Strathbogieが1311年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Athollは26歳，母Jeanne Comynは19歳であった。1332年以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドフエルトンでEleanor Feltonと結婚した。彼は1402年4月14日に91歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアホーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adomar Strathbogie(이)가 1311년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne Comyn(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1332년 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 프턴에서 Eleanor Felton(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1402년 4월 14일 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 홀이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adomar Strathbogie nasceu em 1311, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne Comyn, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Felton antes 1332, em Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1402, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Holy, North Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adomar Strathbogie родился в 1311 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Comyn, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Felton перед 1332 г. в местности фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия. Он умер 14 апреля 1402 г. в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности холи, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Eleanor Felton antes de 1332, en Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Murió el 14 de abril de 1402, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Holy, North Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
